fict4_accompanies.description: Boolean opt-in indicating Form FICT-4 (Statement of Fictitious Name) is bundled with this foreign-qualification application. Set when entity.maine_fictitious_name is populated and the filer is using a fictitious name in Maine per 13-B MRSA §301-A. Distinct from generic filing.bundled_with — this is a form-specific declaration with its own checkbox.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

maine_activities_scope.description: Whether the foreign nonprofit seeks authority for ALL activities authorized in its home jurisdiction (Maine-allowed) or only a SPECIFIC subset. Enum: 'all' (FOURTH Yes) | 'specific' (FOURTH No, with subset detailed in entity.maine_specific_activities_line{1,2}).

physical_address_line1.description: Two-line single-concept physical address of the principal/registered office (combined street/city/state/zip). Distinct from the physical+mailing pair pattern on MBCA-12 — NP_MNPCA-12 uses two widgets for one address concept rather than physical-plus-optional-mailing.

physical_address_line2.description: Two-line single-concept physical address of the principal/registered office (combined street/city/state/zip). Distinct from the physical+mailing pair pattern on MBCA-12 — NP_MNPCA-12 uses two widgets for one address concept rather than physical-plus-optional-mailing.

home_purpose_description_line1.description: Two-line free-text description of the purposes the foreign nonprofit is authorized to carry on under the laws of its home jurisdiction. _line1/_line2 split mirrors registered_office.address_line{1,2} convention.

home_purpose_description_line2.description: Two-line free-text description of the purposes the foreign nonprofit is authorized to carry on under the laws of its home jurisdiction. _line1/_line2 split mirrors registered_office.address_line{1,2} convention.

maine_specific_activities_line1.description: Two-line free-text description of the specific subset of activities for which Maine authority is sought, used when entity.maine_activities_scope='specific'.

maine_specific_activities_line2.description: Two-line free-text description of the specific subset of activities for which Maine authority is sought, used when entity.maine_activities_scope='specific'.
